entities.name: MAHBUBNAGAR DISTRICT

entities.description: The country where the study was conducted

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit of input

entities.name: WHOLE-FARM PROFITABILITY
entities.description: The overall financial gain from all farm enterprises

entities.name: GREENHOUSE GAS MITIGATION
entities.description: The process of reducing the emission of greenhouse gases

entities.description: Farmers with small landholdings in semi-arid India

entities.name: SEMI-ARID
entities.description: A climatic condition characterized by low and irregular rainfall

entities.name: SIMULATION MODELLING
entities.description: The use of mathematical models to simulate crop, livestock, and whole-farm systems

entities.name: COOL FARM TOOL
entities.description: A tool used to estimate net greenhouse gas emissions from farms

entities.name: NET GHG EMISSIONS
entities.description: The total amount of greenhouse gases emitted minus those sequestered

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE MITIGATION
entities.description: Actions taken to reduce or prevent emission of greenhouse gases

entities.name: REDUCED TILLAGE
entities.description: An agricultural practice that minimizes soil disturbance

entities.name: RETAINING CROP-RESIDUE
entities.description: The practice of leaving crop remains on the field after harvest

entities.name: IMPROVED NITROGEN MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Optimizing the application of nitrogen fertilizers

entities.name: ORGANIC MANURE
entities.description: Natural fertilizers derived from animal or plant waste

entities.name: IMPROVED LIVESTOCK FEEDING PRACTICES
entities.description: Enhanced methods of feeding livestock to improve efficiency and reduce emissions

entities.name: AGRO-FORESTRY
entities.description: The integration of trees and shrubs into crop and livestock systems

entities.name: GHG ABATEMENT
entities.description: The reduction of greenhouse gas emissions

entities.name: PARTICIPATORY DESIGN
entities.description: An approach to design that involves all stakeholders

entities.name: CLIMATE SMART AGRICULTURE
entities.description: An integrated approach to managing landscapes to address food security and climate change

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE DEVELOPMENT GOALS
entities.description: Global goals for sustainable development

entities.name: ADAPTATION
entities.description: Adjustments in ecological, social, or economic systems in response to climate change
